summary: Iteration 55 - Avatar Generation Fix (ImageContent/UserMessage API), Tab Order Change, Specs Display. All 9 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend verifications passed.

BACKEND_1_generate_avatar_no_images_erro.details: Fixed: Now uses ImageContent(image_base64=...) and UserMessage(text=..., file_contents=...) instead of old 'images' and 'base64_data' kwargs that caused TypeError

BACKEND_2_generate_avatar_variant_no_ima.details: Same fix applied - uses ImageContent(image_base64=...) and UserMessage(file_contents=...)

BACKEND_3_master_voice_still_works.details: Endpoint still works correctly after changes

BACKEND_4_auth_required_all_endpoints.details: generate-avatar, generate-avatar-variant, master-voice all require authentication (401/403 without token)

FRONTEND_1_video_tab_first_left_position.details: Video tab is positioned on the LEFT (x=726), Photo tab on the RIGHT (x=960)
FRONTEND_1_video_tab_first_left_position.code_ref: PipelineView.jsx:1932-1943 - Video tab comes before Photo tab in DOM order

FRONTEND_2_video_tab_best_badge.details: Video tab shows 'BEST' badge (uppercase). Text: 'From Video\nBEST'

FRONTEND_3_video_tab_selected_default.details: Video tab is selected by default (golden color #C9A84C applied)

FRONTEND_4_photo_tab_dimmed_when_not_sel.details: Photo tab has dimmed gray text (#444/#555) when not selected
FRONTEND_4_photo_tab_dimmed_when_not_sel.code_ref: PipelineView.jsx:1941 - text-[#444] hover:text-[#666] when not selected

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 55: Avatar generation endpoints (generate-avatar, generate-avatar-variant) now work correctly with Gemini API using ImageContent(image_base64=...) and UserMessage(file_contents=...). Tab order in avatar modal is Video (left with 'Best' badge) -> Photo (right, dimmed). Video/Photo specs sections display correctly. All translation keys for specs exist in en.json, pt.json, es.json.

bug_fix_verification.original_error: UserMessage.__init__() got an unexpected keyword argument 'images'
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: Code was using old emergentintegrations API: UserMessage(images=[...], base64_data=...) which no longer exists
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Changed to ImageContent(image_base64=...) and UserMessage(text=..., file_contents=[...])
bug_fix_verification.verification: Backend tests confirm no 'images' or 'base64_data' keyword argument errors occur
